trait.name: Lurker in the Fog
trait.effect:
You ignore cover from obscured spaces.
You can swap places with any unoccupied obscured space or adverse space in range 1-3 as a quick ability during your turn.

basicAttack.name: Magi
basicAttack.effect:
Attack: 2 damage. Hit: +1d6
Area effect: 2 damage
Effect a difficult (5+) dangerous terrain space in the center space, even if it's occupied.

limitBreak.name: Vapor Form
limitBreak.effect:
You meld into a wraith of mist, quick, terrifying, and no less deadly.
Effect the rest of combat:
• you gain phasing and flying when you move
• you can share space with other characters
• you have cover from all directions
• you are both a character and an obscured space. Effects cannot remove you, but can move you around if they move or affect terrain.

keywords.name: Phasing
keywords.description: May pass through obstructions while moving but may not end any movement inside an obstruction.
